function.name: searchLongTermMemory
function.description: Search long-term memory (semantic memory + archived topics). Supports optional date-range, kind and sort filters. For relative dates like 'yesterday' / 'last week', first call getTime to obtain the current date, then pass absolute ISO dates in SinceDate/UntilDate.

IncludeHistorical.description: Whether to include memories marked as 'historical' (superseded/invalidated). Default false.

SinceDate.description: Optional lower bound (inclusive) for memory timestamp. Accepts 'YYYY-MM-DD' or ISO datetime. Leave empty for no lower bound.

UntilDate.description: Optional upper bound (exclusive) for memory timestamp. Accepts 'YYYY-MM-DD' (interpreted as end-of-day, i.e. next day 00:00) or ISO datetime. Leave empty for no upper bound.

MemoryKind.description: Filter by memory kind. 'atomic_memory' for semantic facts (default), 'all' for all kinds. Topic summaries are searched via searchFullText / listTopicsByDate instead.

SortBy.description: Result ordering. 'relevance' keeps rerank scoring (default). 'recency' skips rerank and sorts by timestamp descending — preferred when filtering by date.
